content.intro: When tenants need to be added, removed, or replaced during an active tenancy, you can create a tenant change request. This process includes referencing new tenants and updating the tenancy record.

steps.title: Open the tenancy
steps.content: Navigate to Tenancies and click on the active tenancy that needs modification.

steps.title: Click 'Tenant Change'
steps.content: In the tenancy detail view, click the 'Tenant Change' button in the actions area.

steps.title: Select change type
steps.content: Choose from: Add tenant, Remove tenant, or Replace tenant (one out, one in).

steps.title: Enter new tenant details
steps.content: If adding or replacing, enter the new tenant's name, email, and contact information.

steps.title: Submit the request
steps.content: Click 'Submit' to create the tenant change request. A reference request will be sent to any new tenants.

sections.title: Reference Requirements
sections.content: New tenants joining an existing tenancy must complete the standard reference process. Once their reference passes, the tenant change can be completed and the tenancy updated.

sections.title: Deposit Implications
sections.content: Tenant changes may require updating the deposit protection details. Ensure you amend the protection with your deposit scheme to reflect the correct tenant names.

sections.title: Tracking Changes
sections.content: View pending and completed tenant changes in the tenancy detail page under the 'Changes' tab. Each change shows the date, type, and current status.
